  Now, where to take the prototype next? There are a few distinct experiences we just opened up:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ☐ Next build

Which experience should I prototype next?

❯ 1. Group fair + NetTrans (Recommended)
     Passenger view: one-tap 'save my seat' on a van trip to a CSA-booth fair, hiding the orchestration. Best demo of 'complex back-end, simple experience' — directly answers your integration
     question.
↓ 2. CSA provider onboarding
     Chat-first onboarding for a new farmer/CSA: describe your offering → LLM structures it → admin-vet preview. Shows the supply-side join flow.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  6. Chat about this

Enter to select · ↑/↓ to navigate · Esc to cancel
